title: NHDTA-531 Let her stay at a love hotel with her best friend (♂) and do nothing overnight for 1 million yen
overview: Does a best friend trusted by a boyfriend do nothing even if he stays at a love hotel overnight with his boyfriend's girlfriend? I had you challenge the verification project. Suddenly, at a love hotel where three people entered, I was able to urgently use my boyfriend and I was alone with her and my best friend. Two people who are confused but have time to spare massage and watch AV. In addition, her appearance after taking a bath ... A series of unexpected happenings for her boyfriend!
